name: home-energy-battery
description: ECHONET Lite tools for local HEMS energy devices.

scripts.check: node --check home-energy-battery-node.js && node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js
scripts.test: node tests/helpers.test.js && node tests/history-store.test.js && node tests/database-upgrade.test.js && node tests/database-upgrade-server.test.js && node tests/device-simulator.test.js && node tests/device-adapter-integration.test.js && node tests/adaptive-charging-isolation.test.js && node tests/ene-farm.test.js && node tests/gas-tariffs.test.js && node tests/chart-utils.test.js
